data.title: Binance Completes USDC Integration on Hedera Hashgraph Network, Opens Deposit and Withdrawal Services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it has completed the integration of USDC on the Hedera Hashgraph network and officially opened deposit and withdrawal services. Users can obtain the assigned USDC deposit address through the platform and view the relevant smart contract address on the Hedera Hashgraph network. USDC is issued by Circle Internet Financial Europe SAS, and holders can apply for redemption from Circle SAS at face value at any time. This integration further expands Binance's support for multi-chain assets.

data.title: Euler Finance Suffers Major Loss in DeFi Lending Attack
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2023, the decentralized finance (DeFi) lending protocol Euler Finance experienced a significant security breach. The attack resulted in a loss of approximately $197 million. This incident highlights the ongoing vulnerabilities within the DeFi sector, emphasizing the need for enhanced security measures to protect digital assets.

data.title: Dutch Regulator Fines BUX €1.6 Million For Regulatory Breach
data.description: According to PANews, the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets (AFM) has imposed a €1.6 million fine on the online cryptocurrency and stock trading platform BUX. The penalty was issued due to BUX's use of financial influencers and referral programs to attract new customers, which violated industry regulations.

data.title: Starknet Foundation Aims To Enhance Bitcoin Network Throughput
data.description: According to Odaily, the Starknet Foundation has announced on the X platform its commitment to remain active on Ethereum while also becoming the execution layer for Bitcoin. The foundation's goal is to increase the Bitcoin network's throughput from 7 transactions per second (TPS) to several thousand TPS.

data.title: S&P 500 ends market session with gains for the first time in 6 days
data.description:
The S&P 500 finally snapped its six-day losing streak on Wednesday, closing 0.5% higher as investors rushed into beaten-down tech stocks. The Nasdaq Composite jumped by 1.2%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.2%, extending its own three-day slide, according to data from CNBC. Futures for major indexes ticked up after the closing […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sp-500-ends-market-session-with-gains/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 84,000 USDT with a 0.69% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 01:52 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 84,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 84,148.320313 USDT, with a narrowed 0.69% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: When AI Models Are Pressured to 'Behave' They Scheme in Private, Just like Us: OpenAI
data.description:
OpenAI study finds punishing AI for "bad thoughts" teaches it to hide intentions rather than improve behavior
source: https://decrypt.co/309592/when-ai-models-are-pressured-to-behave-they-scheme-in-private-just-like-us-openai

data.title: Planet Morning News
Alliance DAO founder: ETH is currently severely oversold, it is hard not to buy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Alliance DAO founder and core contributor Qiao Wang posted on the X platform that ETH's current oversold level is similar to the level after the Terra crash in 2021, the deep bear market in 2018 (prices fell to double digits), and the DAO hacker attack in 2016. At such an oversold level, it is hard not to want to buy.
